description_long: This nightstand features a simple, modern cubic design with a rich, dark wood finish on all visible surfaces. The front face includes a single drawer with a recessed cutout handle, providing a minimalist and functional aesthetic. The nightstand is elevated by four slender, metallic legs with a gold or brass finish, giving it a light and airy appearance while maintaining stability. The sides and back are unadorned, emphasizing clean lines and a smooth, uninterrupted wood grain. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware beyond the recessed handle and metallic legs.
description: A modern nightstand with a dark wood body, single recessed-handle drawer, and gold metallic legs. Its clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with a recessed handle and gold metallic legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood side panel and metallic legs, with no visible handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wood panel and metallic legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wood panel and metallic legs, mirroring the left side.
attribute_leg_design: slender metallic legs with a gold finish
